hero.title: Free digital platform for brick kiln owners, end red brick customers, fuel, transport and other service providers.
hero.subtitle: Connecting brick kiln owners with stakeholders through innovative digital solutions

countdown.title: Launching Soon
countdown.description: We're excited to announce that E-Ent Bazaar will be launching on April 30, 2025. Join our waitlist to be among the first to access our platform.
countdown.launchMessage: LAUNCHED ON 30TH APRIL 2025, BRICK KILN OWNERS (BKOs) CAN FILL UP THE ONBOARDING FORM TO JOIN OUR MEMBERSHIP WAITINGLIST
countdown.platformUnlocked: UNLOCKED OUR DIGITAL PLATFORM SERVICES FOR ALL STAKEHOLDERS. PLEASE CONTACT US TO JOIN OUR UNIQUE PLATFORM.

about.title: About E-Ent Bazaar
about.description1: E-Ent Bazaar, a friend in your need - a free digital platform to connect Pan India brick kiln owners with end customers of red bricks, fuel and transport and other service providers and to prevent labor fraud as well as to bring innovation.
about.description2: E-Ent Bazaar, a friend in your need - a free digital platform to connect Pan India brick kiln owners with end customers of red bricks, fuel and transport and other service providers, to prevent labor fraud and for innovation in the industry

services.title: Our Services
services.description: E-Ent Bazaar offers a range of services tailored to the needs of brick kiln owners and stakeholders.

free.title: Free Services
free.description: Available to all brick kiln owners across India, our free services provide essential tools and resources to support your business operations.
items: Buy e-ENT dashboard for Red Brick Buyers
List of certified Coal/Fuel and Transport providers
Labor recruitment reports and forms and real-time fraud alerts
Blogs and resources for innovative and new technologies

exclusive.title: Exclusive Services
exclusive.description: Available to a limited number of brick kiln owners in each district, our exclusive services provide advanced features and personalized support.
exclusive.note: Fill up our Questionnaire- Join the waitlist now!

onboarding.title: Join Our Waitlist
onboarding.description: Fill out the onboarding form below to be among the first to access E-Ent Bazaar - a friend in your need when we launch on April 30, 2025.

footer.description: A free digital platform for brick kiln owners and stakeholders. A friend in your need.

waitlistConfirmation.thankYou: Thank you for joining our waitlist!
waitlistConfirmation.received: We have received your information and added you to our waitlist. We'll send updates
waitlistConfirmation.updates: as we get closer to our launch date.
waitlistConfirmation.keepEye: Keep an eye on your email for updates and special pre-launch information.

profile.deleteAccountSubtitle: Permanently delete your account and data
profile.deleteAccountConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove all your data including orders, inquiries, and profile information.
profile.finalConfirmationMessage:
This is your final warning. Deleting your account will:

• Permanently remove all your data
• Cancel any pending orders
• Delete your profile and history
• This action cannot be undone

Type "DELETE" to confirm:
profile.deletingAccountMessage: Please wait while we delete your account...
profile.accountDeletedMessage: Your account has been successfully deleted. Thank you for using our service.
profile.failedToDeleteAccount: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
profile.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while deleting your account. Please try again.
profile.accountReactivatedMessage: Your previously deleted account has been reactivated successfully.
profile.accountDeletedLoginMessage: This account has been deleted. Please contact support if you believe this is an error.
